rows.snippet: After Updating to WebLink 10.2, You May Notice that Custom Links Do Not Display When WebLink is Configured for Automatic Login 6 years ago After Updating to WebLink 10.2, You May Notice that Custom Links Do Not Display When WebLink is Configured for Automatic Login June 4, 2020 | KB: 1014166 https://support.laserfiche ... d... https://support.laserfiche.com/kb/1014166/after-updating-to-weblink-10-2 ...
rows.title: After Updating to WebLink 10.2, You May Notice that Custom Links Do Not Display When WebLink is Configured for Automatic Login
rows.detailTitle: After Updating to WebLink 10.2, You May Notice that Custom Links Do Not Display When WebLink is Configured for Automatic Login
rows.detailText: Product Support Learn Blake Smith After Updating to WebLink 10.2, You May Notice that Custom Links Do Not Display When WebLink is Configured for Automatic Login Product: WebLink 10.2 KB: 1014166 Published: June 4, 2020 Last Updated: June 4, 2020 Summary After upgrading to WebLink 10.2, you may notice that custom links do not appear on the welcome page if you have configured WebLink for automatic sign-in. Cause This may occur when the WebLink welcome page URL does not contain the DBID and REPO parameters. Workaround You may directly link using a URL that includes the DBID and REPO parameters. Alternatively, you can use IIS to create a rewrite URL. For more information, see Microsoft's documentation on IIS URL Rewrite. Share 2026 Laserfiche Privacy Trademark

rows.snippet: List of Changes for WebLink 10.1. 8 years ago https://support.laserfiche.com/kb/1013953/list-of-changes-for-weblink-10-1- WebLink 10 Summary WebLink 10.1 includes the following changes: In certain scenarios, you could see an ... one... https://support.laserfiche.com/kb/1013953/list-of-changes-for-weblink-10 ...
rows.title: List of Changes for WebLink 10.1.
rows.detailText: Product Support Learn Sign in List of Changes for WebLink 10.1. Product: WebLink 10 KB: 1013953 Published: April 30, 2018 Last Updated: May 4, 2018 Summary WebLink 10.1 includes the following changes: In certain scenarios, you could see an "Unable to export document. Permission denied." error message when viewing a PDF file that does not have Laserfiche image pages. this issue is now resolved. (85823) Site visitors no longer receive a "Error loading thumbnail data [9013]" error message when viewing documents. (82610) When modifying the search query on a custom search form, the date field search query displays correctly when selecting the Before or After operator. (82064) Custom search forms now include a reset button for clearing the search. (81471) In certain situations, WebLink would not display image pages for PDF files generated by Workflow. This issue is now resolved. (81075) Certain PDF files did not download correctly from WebLink. This issue is now resolved. (76279) The Print (as PDF) option now functions correctly when the document name contains a character that must be percent encoded. (70987) The WebLink Designer no longer displays an "Invalid configuration: Repositories with the same name must have different logins." error message when configuring multiple DBIDs that use the same repository, but auto-login with different users. (70580) The WebLink Designer now properly removes custom links when configuring on a non-default virtual directory. (67789) The WebLink Designer now has a Manage button for removing registered virtual directories. (67763) The WebLink Designer now has additional options when configuring a repository connection and selecting the Auto-login with Windows credentials option. Choose between using the accessing user's account or an anonymous access account. (64716) The WebLink Settings Bundler now exports: Custom Links Search Forms Theme Settings Advanced search now properly supports selecting values for dynamic fields. Resolution Important: Before installing WebLink 10.1, first use the WebLink Settings Bundler to export your WebLink Designer 10.0 settings for later import to WebLink 10.1. Important: If you have customized ASPX pages in your WebLink 10.0 installation, please be sure to back them up before installing WebLink 10.1. Click one of the following links to download the Laserfiche WebLink 10.1 installation package. WebLink 10.1 ZIP download WebLink 10.1 ISO download Note: After upgrading from version 10.0 to 10.1, you may need to perform a hard refresh of your web browser tab or clear the web browser cache to properly view WebLink. 2026 Laserfiche Privacy Trademark

rows.snippet: List of Changes for WebLink 10 8 years ago https://support.laserfiche.com/kb/1013923/list-of-changes-for-weblink-10 WebLink 10 Summary WebLink 10 includes many new features and enhancements, improving the WebLink experienc... https://support.laserfiche.com/kb/1013923/list-of-changes-for-weblink-10 ...
rows.title: List of Changes for WebLink 10
rows.detailText: Product Support Learn Sign in List of Changes for WebLink 10 Product: WebLink 10 KB: 1013923 Published: January 8, 2018 Last Updated: March 26, 2018 Summary WebLink 10 includes many new features and enhancements, improving the WebLink experience and making it easier to customize WebLink. New Features Improved WebLink Website The WebLink website has been updated, providing a more responsive design and a more modern feel. It also includes support for several new Laserfiche Server features. Web-Based WebLink Designer In prior versions of WebLink, the WebLink Designer was a desktop application. WebLink Designer is now a web-based application, allowing administrative users to customize the website from any computer, and providing a modern, streamlined user interface for customizing WebLink's design. Improved Search Form Interface The updated WebLink Designer includes a streamlined, improved search form designer. The same functionality is available as in prior versions of the search form designer, but in a more easy-to-use interface. Other Improvements WebLink also includes the following new features: Document thumbnails can now be viewed when browsing documents in the folder browser. WebLink now supports single sign-on with Laserfiche Directory Server. Multi-value field groups and redaction reasons, features introduced in Laserfiche 10.3, are now supported in WebLink. More Information The following minor changes and fixes were also added to WebLink 10: Resolved an issue that could cause users to be logged out, or searches to fail, when WebLink is open in multiple tabs. (50368) When the grid view for searching was enabled, some searches would return a "No results found" error before correctly displaying results. This issue has been resolved. (29969, 137427) Repository names containing accented characters now display correctly. (29992, 139837) When opening WebLink using a link generated by Laserfiche Connector, single-result searches now correctly open the document. (29968, 148892) In some cases, customization of the DefaultSortColumn parameter in search.aspx resulted in a "Compilation Error" message. This issue has been resolved. (29964, 148897) Resolved an issue in which sessions could be disconnected when opening a document using a URL with the openpdf=true parameter. (29970, 146123) Related Links 1013924 Release Notes for WebLink 10 2026 Laserfiche Privacy Trademark

rows.snippet: Displaying more context hits when searching in WebLink 10 7 years ago kb/1013986/displaying-more-context-hits-when-searching-in-weblink-10 WebLink 10 Summary When searching a folder in WebLink 10, the number of context hits displayed can be increased ... https://support.laserfiche.com/kb/1013986/displaying-more-context-hits-when ...
rows.title: Displaying more context hits when searching in WebLink 10
rows.detailTitle: Displaying more context hits when searching in WebLink 10
rows.detailText: Product Support Learn Blake Smith Displaying more context hits when searching in WebLink 10 Product: WebLink 10 KB: 1013986 Published: August 29, 2018 Last Updated: August 29, 2018 Summary When searching a folder in WebLink 10, the number of context hits displayed can be increased beyond the default value of 5 by editing the SearchResultsSettings.xml file. This works only if you are using the original search.aspx file that came with WebLink 10. If you had changed your configuration to use the old search9.aspx file, editing SearchResultsSettings.xml will not work and you can increase the number of context hits displayed to at most 20. To increase the number of context hits displayed Navigate to the WebLink\Web Files subfolder of your WebLink installation folder. By default, this is C:\Program Files\Laserfiche\WebLink\WebLink\Web Files. Open the SearchResultsSettings.xml file for editing. If you do not see this file, open the WebLink Designer and navigate to the Search Results page. Make any change on the page and click Save. This will generate the SearchResultsSettings.xml file. After you are done with the instructions in this topic, you can go back and undo the change on the Search Results page. Locate the <DisplayEntry> block that contains the string ModuleType="CONTEXT_HITS". Locate the <Options> block that immediately follows this <DisplayEntry> block. Modify the value of MaximumListSize within this <Options> block to have the maximum number of displayed context hits you want. For example, to change the maximum from the default 5 to 60, replace MaximumListSize="5" with MaximumListSize="60". On the WebLink server, restart IIS. On the computer you are using to test the settings, clear your browser's cache. Try a new search to confirm that the new settings have been implemented. Note: This method works only in WebLink 10 or later. In addition, this method does not work if you had configured WebLink 10 to use the Search9.aspx file. Share 2026 Laserfiche Privacy Trademark

rows.snippet: List of Changes for Quick Fields 10.3 Hotfix 1014204 5 years ago https://support.laserfiche.com/kb/1014204/list-of-changes-for-quick-fields-10-3-hotfix-1014204 Quick Fields Summary To ensure the highest level of security, Laserfiche Cloud is ending ..... https://support.laserfiche.com/kb/1014204/list-of-changes-for-quick-fiel ...
rows.title: List of Changes for Quick Fields 10.3 Hotfix 1014204
rows.detailTitle: List of Changes for Quick Fields 10.3 Hotfix 1014204
rows.detailText: Product Support Learn Sign in List of Changes for Quick Fields 10.3 Hotfix 1014204 Product: Quick Fields KB: 1014204 Published: October 14, 2020 Last Updated: March 22, 2021 Summary To ensure the highest level of security, Laserfiche Cloud is ending support for connections using TLS 1.0 or 1.1 as of January 1, 2021. Organizations on these versions may encounter "No response received from the server" errors when attempting to access a repository in Laserfiche Cloud using a locally-installed client application. To ensure a smooth transition, Laserfiche is releasing patches to deprecate TLS 1.0 and 1.1 support. This will ensure that no additional configuration is required for these products. Note: While this change is specific to Laserfiche Cloud repositories, these patches can be used to make the transition to TLS 1.2 or higher easier for on-premises implementations that wish to end use of TLS 1.0 or 1.1 as well. If you are using Windows 7, Windows Server 2012, or Windows Server 2008 R2 and have not installed the update to enable TLS 1.1 and TLS 1.2 as default secure protocols in WinHTTP you will also need to enable TLS 1.2 on the computers on which you will use these client applications. See End-of-Support for TLS 1.0 and 1.1 for Laserfiche Cloud for instructions on patching the other relevant products. List of Changes Quick Fields will now use the TLS settings specified by the operating system when negotiating connections to the Laserfiche Server. Note: This Quick Fields hotfix 1014204 supersedes the following three hotfixes: 1013952 1014105 1014141 The update includes the following files: Quick Fields BatchProcessor.Connection.dll (10.3.0.110) BPImageWrapper.dll (10.3.0.0) BPImageWrapper10.dll (10.3.0.0) BPPDFImporter83.dll (10.3.0.110) BPPDFProcessor.dll (10.3.0.110) Google.Protobuf.dll (3.4.0.0) icudt59.dll (59.1.0.0) icuin59.dll (59.1.0.0) icuuc59.dll (59.1.0.0) Interop.LFSO103Lib.dll (10.3.0.0) itextsharp.dll (4.1.7.19) Laserfiche.BatchProcessor.UI.dll (10.3.0.110) Laserfiche.DocumentServices.dll (10.3.0.261) Laserfiche.FieldsViewer.dll (10.3.0.0) Laserfiche.HttpClient.dll (10.3.0.261) Laserfiche.I18n.dll (10.3.0.261) Laserfiche.QuickFields.Agent.Base.dll (10.3.0.110) Laserfiche.QuickFields.Agent.exe (10.3.0.110) Laserfiche.QuickFields.Base.dll (10.3.0.110) Laserfiche.QuickFields.Connection.dll (10.3.0.110) Laserfiche.QuickFields.exe (10.3.0.110) Laserfiche.QuickFields.Processes.Barcode.dll (10.3.0.110) Laserfiche.QuickFields.Processes.PDF.dll (10.3.0.110) Laserfiche.QuickFields.RepositoryAccess.dll (10.3.0.110) Laserfiche.QuickFields.Runtime.dll (10.3.0.110) Laserfiche.RepositoryAccess.dll (10.3.0.261) Laserfiche.RepositoryAccess.resources.dll (10.3.0.261) Laserfiche.TextProviderClient.dll (10.3.0.261) LFCE.exe (10.1.0.110) LfLicenseReader.dll (10.4.0.79) lfomniocr19.exe (10.2.0.156) LFSO103.dll (10.3.0.103) LFWicUtil104.dll (10.4.0.15) libxml2.dll (2.9.6.100) libxslt.dll (1.1.30.100) O2S.Components.PDFRender4NET.dll (5.0.3.9) O2S.Components.PDFView4NET.dll (5.0.3.9) QuickFields.DocumentModule.dll (10.3.0.110) QuickFields.Scanning.exe (10.3.0.110) SoftekBarcodeDLL.dll (8.3.1.1) SoftekBarcodeNet.dll (8.2.1.4) xmlsec.dll (1.2.24.100) Resolution To update Quick Fields 10.3 The Quick Fields 10.3 hotfix 1014204 contains a service pack that will update Quick Fields. Click the following link to download a zip file containing the service pack. KB1014204.zip Extract and run QuickFields_x86_1030110_KB1014204.msp on the same machine as Quick Fields. Related Links Release and Hotfix Information for Quick Fields 10.3 Release Notes for Quick Fields 10.3 List of Changes for Quick Fields 10.3 2026 Laserfiche Privacy Trademark

rows.snippet: List of Changes for Quick Fields 10.3 Hotfix 1013952 5 years ago https://support.laserfiche.com/kb/1013952/list-of-changes-for-quick-fields-10-3-hotfix-1013952 Quick Fields 10 Summary This article details hotfix 101952 for Quick Fields 10.3 ...... https://support.laserfiche.com/kb/1013952/list-of-changes-for-quick-fiel ...
rows.title: List of Changes for Quick Fields 10.3 Hotfix 1013952
rows.detailTitle: List of Changes for Quick Fields 10.3 Hotfix 1013952
rows.detailText: Product Support Learn Blake Smith List of Changes for Quick Fields 10.3 Hotfix 1013952 Product: Quick Fields 10 KB: 1013952 Published: June 22, 2018 Last Updated: March 22, 2021 Summary This article details hotfix 101952 for Quick Fields 10.3, which resolves the following issues: Quick Fields no longer unexpectedly closes when reviewing documents with numerous multi-value field (or multi-value field group) instances. (33736) In Quick Fields, when any process is configured under Pre-Classification Processing,"Error writing XML.%s" is no longer displayed in the Output and Processing Information pane when using Laserfiche Capture Engine with Keep each entry as a separate document selected. The documents also now process correctly. (58823) In Quick Fields, you no longer have to select If the entry already has Laserfiche pages, overwrite them option in order for electronic documents with text, scanned with Laserfiche Capture Engine, to be processed correctly when scanning. (60648) In Quick Fields, text fields longer than 50 characters now properly display as a multi-line field. (66420) Quick Fields Agent now properly ends Laserfiche Capture Engine processes after running. (68035) Local sessions opened in Quick Fields are no longer marked as "modified" without making any changes to them. You will also no longer receive a prompt to save the session, without modifications, when closing it. (76755) Session responsiveness no longer graudally decresases when clicking through documents in the Document Revision pane in Quick Fields. (77114) A Quick Fields session that reads barcodes now processes without errors and populates the barcode value correctly in Quick Fields. (82931) You no longer received an error when viewing a schedule in Quick Fields Agent (MMC desktop orWeb Administration Console) after 16 schedules have been created. (83280) In Quick Fields Scanning, required fields, fields with constraints, and certain field types should display an error when field data is not entered correctly, or at all in the case of required fields. Multi-value field group instances after the first one were not displaying errors correctly. This issue has been resolved. (94099) In Quick Fields Scanning, multi-value dynamic fields that contain values in a required field no longer display a "Required fields must have a value" error and the document can now be stored successfully. (91055) Known Issue The following issue has not been resolved: A template containing a real-time lookup in a multi-value field group is assigned to a document class. Documents are scanned with Quick Fields and assigned this document class containing this template. After viewing one document containing all the multi-value field groups, multi-value field groups displayed after the first one disappear when viewing subsequent documents. (93690) The update includes the following files: Quick Fields QuickFields.Scanning.exe (file version 10.3.0.81) Laserfiche.QuickFields.Processes.Barcode.dll (file version 10.3.0.81) SoftekBarcodeDLL.dll (file version 8.3.1.1) SoftekBarcodeNet.dll (file version 8.2.1.4) Laserfiche.BatchProcessor.UI.dll (file version 10.3.0.81) Laserfiche.FieldsViewer.dll (file version 10.3.0.0) Laserfiche.QuickFields.Base.dll (file version 10.3.0.81) Laserfiche.QuickFields.exe (file version 10.3.0.81) Laserfiche.QuickFields.Processes.Barcode.dll (file version 10.3.0.81) LFCE.exe (file version 10.1.0.81) Laserfiche.QuickFields.Agent.exe (file version 10.3.0.81) Laserfiche.QuickFields.Agent.Base.dll (file version 10.3.0.81) QuickFields.DocumentModule.dll (file version 10.3.0.81) Resolution To update Quick Fields 10.3 The Quick Fields 10.3 hotfix 1013952 contains a service pack that will update Quick Fields and Quick Fields Scanning. Click the following link to download a zip file containing the service pack. KB1013952.zip Extract and run QuickFields_x86_103081_KB1013952.msp on the same machine as Quick Fields and Quick Fields Scanning. If they are on different machines, the msp file will need to be installed on both machines. Related Links List of Changes for Quick Fields 10 Update 1 Release Notes for Quick Fields 10.3 List of Changes for Quick Fields 10.3 Important Note: Quick Fields hotfix 1013952 has been superseded by hotfix in KB 1014141. Share 2026 Laserfiche Privacy Trademark

rows.detailTitle: List of Changes for Quick Fields 10.3 Hotfix 1014141
rows.detailText: Product Support Learn Blake Smith List of Changes for Quick Fields 10.3 Hotfix 1014141 Product: Quick Fields 10.3 KB: 1014141 Published: March 24, 2020 Last Updated: March 24, 2020 Summary This article details hotfix 1014141 for Quick Fields 10.3, which resolves the following issues: Processing a certain batch of documents no longer turns the pages pink. (123543) The Bates Numbering process no longer causes Quick Fields Scanning to generate a separate document for each page scanned. (221091) A multi-value field being populated from a multi-value token now populates correctly. (188019) Using Laserfiche Capture Engine to capture and generate pages for certain PDFs no longer results in black spots/lines on the images. (231920) Note: This Quick Fields hotfix 1014141 supercedes the following two hotfixes: 1013952 1014105 The update includes the following files: Quick Fields BPPDFProcessor.dll (file version 10.3.0.108) Laserfiche.QuickFields.Connection.dll (file version 10.3.0.108) Laserfiche.QuickFields.Processes.Barcode.dll (file version 10.3.0.108) Laserfiche.QuickFields.Runtime.dll (file version 10.3.0.108) LFWicUtil104.dll (file version 10.4.0.15) QuickFields.DocumentModule.dll (file version 10.3.0.108) SoftekBarcodeDLL.dll (file version 8.3.1.1) SoftekBarcodeNet.dll (file version 8.2.1.4) QuickFields.Scanning.exe (file version 10.3.0.108) Laserfiche.BatchProcessor.UI.dll (file version 10.3.0.108) Laserfiche.FieldsViewer.dll (file version 10.3.0.0) Laserfiche.QuickFields.Agent.Base.dll (file version 10.3.0.108) Laserfiche.QuickFields.Base.dll (file version 10.3.0.108) Laserfiche.QuickFields.Processes.Barcode.dll (file version 10.3.0.108) LFWicUtil104.dll (file version 10.4.0.15) SoftekBarcodeDLL.dll (file version 8.3.1.1) SoftekBarcodeNet.dll (file version 8.2.1.4) Laserfiche.QuickFields.Agent.exe (file version 10.3.0.108) Laserfiche.QuickFields.exe (file version 10.3.0.108) LFCE.exe (file version 10.1.0.108) lfomniocr19.exe (file version 10.2.0.156) itextsharp.dll (file version 4.1.7.19) O2S.Components.PDFRender4NET.dll (file version 5.0.3.9) O2S.Components.PDFView4NET.dll (file version 5.0.3.9) LfLicenseReader.dll (file version: 10.4.0.79) BPPDFImporter83.dll (file version 10.3.0.108) Laserfiche.QuickFields.Processes.PDF.dll (file version 10.3.0.108) BPImageWrapper.dll (file version 10.3.0.0) BPImageWrapper10.dll (file version 10.3.0.0) Resolution To update Quick Fields 10.3 The Quick Fields 10.3 hotfix 1014141 contains a service pack that will update Quick Fields. Click the following link to download a zip file containing the service pack. KB1014141.zip Extract and run QuickFields_x86_1030108_KB1014141.msp on the same machine as Quick Fields.
